Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** **********************************************************

Contents:

- Given a coreflection F -| G : C -> D, and a monad
  relative to J : A -> C, construct a monad
  relative to FJ : A -> D
- The postcomposition map extends to monad morphisms

Benedikt Ahrens, October 2018

************************************************************)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.RelativeMonads.

Local Open Scope cat.


(** * Postcomposition of a relative monad with a coreflection *)

Section RMonad_transfer.

Context {A C D : category}
        (J : functor A C)
        (F : functor C D)
        (G : functor D C)
        (eta : nat_trans (functor_identity C) (functor_composite F G))
        (eps : nat_trans (functor_composite G F) (functor_identity D))
        (H : form_adjunction F G eta eps).

Let R : are_adjoints F G := ((eta,, eps) ,, H).
Let NHW : (natural_hom_weq F G) := nathomweq_from_adj R.

Let φ {X Y} (f : F X --> Y) : X --> G Y := hom_weq NHW f.
Let φinv {X Y} (g : X --> G Y) : F X --> Y := invweq (hom_weq NHW) g.

Hypothesis corefl : ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c).
Let ηinv (X : C)  : G (F X) --> X := inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X )).


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
is_nat_trans (F ∙ G) (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
is_nat_trans (F ∙ G) (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
has_homsets C
 apply C. Qed.

Section RelMonad_transfer_object.

Variable (T : RelMonad_data J).

(** The new relative monad is given, on objects, by applying
   the coreflection
*)


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)

  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
A → D
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
∏ c : A, D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, ?pr1 c ⟧
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
(λ _ : ∏ c : A, D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, ?pr1 c ⟧,
 ∏ c d : A,
 D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, ?pr1 d ⟧ → D ⟦ ?pr1 c, ?pr1 d ⟧) 
  ?pr10

  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
A → D
 exact (λ a, F (T a)).
  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
∏ c : A, D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, (λ a : A, F (T a)) c ⟧
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
∏ c : A, D ⟦ F (J c), F (T c) ⟧
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
a: A
D ⟦ F (J a), F (T a) ⟧
 exact (#F (r_eta T _ )).
  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
(λ _ : ∏ c : A, D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, (λ a : A, F (T a)) c ⟧,
 ∏ c d : A,
 D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, (λ a : A, F (T a)) d ⟧
 → D ⟦ (λ a : A, F (T a)) c, (λ a : A, F (T a)) d ⟧)
  ((λ a : A, # F (r_eta T a))
   :
   ∏ c : A, D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, (λ a : A, F (T a)) c ⟧)
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
∏ c d : A,
D ⟦ F (J c), F (T d) ⟧ → D ⟦ F (T c), F (T d) ⟧
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
a, b: A
f: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
D ⟦ F (T a), F (T b) ⟧

    exact (φinv (r_bind T (φ f · ηinv _ ) · eta _ )).
Defined.

Notation "'σ'" := (r_bind T).
Notation "'v'" := (r_eta T).
Notation "'φ'" := (φ_adj R).
Notation "'φ-1'" := (φ_adj_inv R).

(** ** Proof of the monad axioms of the composed data *)

Variable (TH : RelMonad_axioms T).


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
RelMonad_axioms RelMonad_composed_data


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
RelMonad_axioms RelMonad_composed_data

  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c: A
φ-1 (σ (φ (# F (v c)) · ηinv (T c)) · eta (pr1 T c)) =
identity (F (T c))
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
# F (v c) · φ-1 (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d)) =
f

F: C ⟶ D

eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d))
· φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)) =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))

G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c: A
# F (σ (?y' · ηinv (T c))) · φ-1 (eta (pr1 T c)) =
identity (F (T c))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c: A
# F
  (σ
     (v c · hom_weq NHW (identity (F (T c)))
      · ηinv (T c))) · φ-1 (eta (pr1 T c)) =
identity (F (T c))

A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G

ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c: A
RT:= iso_inv_after_iso
  (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))): make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))
· inv_from_iso
    (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))) =
identity (functor_identity C (T c))
# F (σ (v c · (eta (T c) · ηinv (T c))))
· φ-1 (eta (pr1 T c)) = identity (F (T c))

eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

# F (σ (v c · (eta (T c) · ηinv (T c))))
· φ-1 (eta (pr1 T c)) = ?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c: A
RT:= iso_inv_after_iso
  (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))): eta (T c)
· inv_from_iso
    (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))) =
identity (T c)
?b = identity (F (T c))

  (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))): eta (T c)

J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G

φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c: A
RT:= iso_inv_after_iso
  (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))): eta (T c)
· inv_from_iso
    (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))) =
identity (T c)
# F (σ ?t2) · φ-1 (eta (pr1 T c)) = identity (F (T c))
     
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c: A
RT:= iso_inv_after_iso
  (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))): eta (T c)
· inv_from_iso
    (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))) =
identity (T c)
eta (T c) · ηinv (T c) = ?t2
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c: A
RT:= iso_inv_after_iso
  (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))): eta (T c)
· inv_from_iso
    (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))) =
identity (T c)
# F (σ (v c · ?t2)) · φ-1 (eta (pr1 T c)) =
identity (F (T c))

J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c: A
RT:= iso_inv_after_iso
  (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))): eta (T c)
· inv_from_iso
    (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))) =
identity (T c)

A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

c: A

  (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))): eta (T c)

?b = identity (F (T c))

A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c: A
RT:= iso_inv_after_iso
  (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))): eta (T c)
· inv_from_iso
    (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))) =
identity (T c)
# F (σ (v c))
· identity (F (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))) =
identity (F (T c))

RT:= iso_inv_after_iso
  (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))): eta (T c)

    (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))) =
identity (T c)
RelMonad_axioms T
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c: A
RT:= iso_inv_after_iso
  (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))): eta (T c)
· inv_from_iso
    (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))) =
identity (T c)
# F (identity (T c)) = identity (F (T c))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c: A
RT:= iso_inv_after_iso
  (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))): eta (T c)
· inv_from_iso
    (make_iso (eta (T c)) (corefl (T c))) =
identity (T c)
# F (identity (T c)) = identity (F (T c))

    apply functor_id.

  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
# F (v c) · φ-1 (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d)) =
f

c, d: A

f =
# F (v c) · φ-1 (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d))

c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
f = ?b

c, d: A

A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)

inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
f =
Core.hom_inv NHW
  (v c
   · pr2 (pr2 C) (T c) (T d) (G (F (pr1 T d)))
       (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d))) (eta (pr1 T d)))

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A

c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧

  (v c · σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d)) = ?b

J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧

?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
?b = f
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
φ f · ηinv (T d) · eta (pr1 T d) = ?t2
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
Core.hom_inv NHW ?t2 = f

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧

c, d: A

A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
Core.hom_inv NHW (φ f · ?t2) = f

     
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
Core.hom_inv NHW (φ f · identity (G (F (T d)))) = f

     
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
Core.hom_inv NHW (φ f) = f

     apply (homotinvweqweq (hom_weq NHW )).

  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d))
· φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)) =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d))
· φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)) = ?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?b =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)) = ?t2
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d)) · ?t2 =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d))
· (# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))
   · Core.hom_inv NHW (eta (pr1 T e))) =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d))
· (# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))) · φ-1 (eta (pr1 T e))) =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d))
· (# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))) · φ-1 (eta (pr1 T e))) =
?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?b =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))) · φ-1 (eta (pr1 T e)) = ?t2
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d)) · ?t2 =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧

J: A ⟶ C

J: A ⟶ C

eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · eta (pr1 T d)) = ?y'
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧

invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?y' · # F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))) =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧

  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)))
· Core.hom_inv NHW (eta (pr1 T d))
· # F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))) =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))

A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?b =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d))) · φ-1 (eta (pr1 T d)) = ?y'
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?y' · # F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))) =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (eta (pr1 T d)) = ?t2
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d))) · ?t2
· # F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))) =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)))
· identity (F (functor_identity C (pr1 T d)))
· # F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))) =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))

J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G

invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧

J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D

eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))) =

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
σ (φ f · ηinv (T d)) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) = ?t2
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F ?t2 =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
RelMonad_axioms T
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))) =
φ-1
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e))

φ-1
  (σ

# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))))

F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧

φ-1

      · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)) = ?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?b = # F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e)))
· Core.hom_inv NHW (eta (pr1 T e)) =
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))))

F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C

ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

TH: RelMonad_axioms T

TH: RelMonad_axioms T

f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?b = # F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))))

J: A ⟶ C

G: D ⟶ C

  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (eta (pr1 T e)) = ?t2

f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧

# F
  (σ
     (φ

      · ηinv (T e))) · ?t2 =

J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

  (σ

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧

A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
      · ηinv (T e))) = ?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?b = # F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
σ
  (φ (f · φ-1 (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)) · eta (pr1 T e)))
   · ηinv (T e)) = ?t2
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G

invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F ?t2 =
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))))

f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧

J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G

  (functor_identity C)
