T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))
· Core.hom_inv NHW (eta (pr1 T e)) = ?t2
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F (σ (φ (f · ?t2) · ηinv (T e))) =
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))) · φ-1 (eta (pr1 T e)) = ?t2
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F (σ (φ (f · ?t2) · ηinv (T e))) =
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ-1 (eta (pr1 T e)) = ?t2
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F
  (σ
     (φ (f · (# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))) · ?t2))
      · ηinv (T e))) =
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))))
     
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F
  (σ
     (φ
        (f
         · (# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))
            · identity
                (F (functor_identity C (pr1 T e)))))
      · ηinv (T e))) =
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# F
  (σ (φ (f · # F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))) · ηinv (T e))) =
# F (σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))))


    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
σ (φ (f · # F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))) · ηinv (T e)) =
σ (φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ (f · # F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))) · ηinv (T e) =
φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))


    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ (f · # F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))) · ηinv (T e) = ?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?b = φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ (f · # F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))) = ?y'
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?y' · ηinv (T e) =
φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
hom_weq NHW f · # G (# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))))
· ηinv (T e) = φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ f · # G (# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))) · ηinv (T e) =
φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))


    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ f · # G (# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))) · ηinv (T e) =
?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?b = φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ f · # G (# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))) · ηinv (T e) =
?b0
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?b0 = ?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?b = φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ f · (# G (# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))) · ηinv (T e)) =
?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
?b = φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
# G (# F (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))) · ηinv (T e) = ?t2
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ f · ?t2 = φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ f
· (ηinv (T d)
   · # (functor_identity C) (σ (φ g · ηinv (T e)))) =
φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data J
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) c, RelMonad_composed_data d ⟧
g: D ⟦ (J ∙ F) d, RelMonad_composed_data e ⟧
φ f · (ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))) =
φ f · ηinv (T d) · σ (φ g · ηinv (T e))

    apply assoc.
Qed.

End RelMonad_transfer_object.

Definition RelMonad_composed (T : RelMonad J) : RelMonad (J ∙ F)
    := RelMonad_composed_data T,, RelMonad_composed_axioms _ T.

(** ** Postcomposition of a monad morphism with a coreflection *)

Section RelMonad_transfer_morphism.

Context {T T' : RelMonad J}
        (f : RelMonadMor T T').

Notation "'σ'" := (r_bind _).
Notation "'v'" := (r_eta _).
Notation "'φ'" := (φ_adj R).
Notation "'φ-1'" := (φ_adj_inv R).


Definition RelMonadMor_composed_data
  : RelMonadMor_data (RelMonad_composed T) (RelMonad_composed T')
  := λ a, (#F (RelMonadMor_map f a)).


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
RelMonadMor_axioms RelMonadMor_composed_data


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
RelMonadMor_axioms RelMonadMor_composed_data

  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
# F (v a) · RelMonadMor_composed_data a = # F (v a)
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
RelMonadMor_composed_data a
· φ-1
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · RelMonadMor_composed_data b)
        · ηinv (T' b)) · 
     eta (pr1 T' b)) =
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· RelMonadMor_composed_data b

  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
# F (v a) · RelMonadMor_composed_data a = # F (v a)
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
# F (v a) · # F (RelMonadMor_map f a) = # F (v a)
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
# F (v a) · # F (RelMonadMor_map f a) = # F (v a)

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
# F (v a) · # F (RelMonadMor_map f a) = ?b

φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧

  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

a: A
?b = # F (v a)

J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps

T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
RelMonadMor_axioms (RelMonadMor_map f)
 apply f.
  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
RelMonadMor_composed_data a
· φ-1
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · RelMonadMor_composed_data b)
        · ηinv (T' b)) · eta (pr1 T' b)) =
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· RelMonadMor_composed_data b
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· φ-1
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)) · eta (pr1 T' b)) =
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)

a, b: A

# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· φ-1

        · ηinv (T' b)) · eta (pr1 T' b)) =

· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G

inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧

  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· φ-1
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)) · eta (pr1 T' b)) = ?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
?b =
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)

J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C

?b =

A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G

φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
?b =
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
Core.hom_inv NHW
  (RelMonadMor_map f a
   · pr2 (pr2 C) (T' a) (T' b) (G (F (pr1 T' b)))
       (σ
          (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
           · ηinv (T' b))) (eta (pr1 T' b))) =
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
φ-1
  (RelMonadMor_map f a
   · pr2 (pr2 C) (T' a) (T' b) (G (F (pr1 T' b)))
       (σ
          (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
           · ηinv (T' b))) (eta (pr1 T' b))) =
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
φ-1
  (RelMonadMor_map f a
   · σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)) · eta (pr1 T' b)) =
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
φ-1
  (RelMonadMor_map f a
   · σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)) · eta (pr1 T' b)) = ?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
?b =
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F
  (RelMonadMor_map f a
   · σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)))
· Core.hom_inv NHW (eta (pr1 T' b)) =
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F
  (RelMonadMor_map f a
   · σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b))) · φ-1 (eta (pr1 T' b)) =
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)

  (RelMonadMor_map f a
   · σ

        · ηinv (T' b))) ·

A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧

  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F
  (RelMonadMor_map f a
   · σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)))
· identity (F (functor_identity C (pr1 T' b))) =
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)

J: A ⟶ C

f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # F
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b))) =

· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)


    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧

T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
φ-1 (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)) · eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b) =
# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # F
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)))

corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)))
· Core.hom_inv NHW (eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b) =
# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # F
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b))) · φ-1 (eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b) =
# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # F
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)))


    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b))) · φ-1 (eta (pr1 T b))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b) = ?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
?b =
# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # F
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)))

F: C ⟶ D

eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

H: form_adjunction F G eta eps

  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F (σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b)))
· identity (F (functor_identity C (pr1 T b)))
· # F (RelMonadMor_map f b) =
# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # F
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)))

· # F
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F (f a · σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b) · f b)) =
# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # F
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F (f a · σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b) · f b)) =
# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # F
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b)))

J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G

φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # F
    (σ
       (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b))
        · ηinv (T' b))) =
# F (f a · σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b) · f b))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G

φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # F

        · ηinv (T' b))) = ?b

f: RelMonadMor T T'

f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# F
  (RelMonadMor_map f a
   · σ

J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

H: form_adjunction F G eta eps

T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧

· σ (φ (f0 · # F (RelMonadMor_map f b)) · ηinv (T' b)) =
f a · σ (φ f0 · ηinv (T b) · f b)

f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
φ f0 · (# G (# F (RelMonadMor_map f b)) · ηinv (T' b)) =
φ f0 · ηinv (T b) · f b


    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
φ f0 · (# G (# F (RelMonadMor_map f b)) · ηinv (T' b)) =
?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
?b = φ f0 · ηinv (T b) · f b
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
# G (# F (RelMonadMor_map f b)) · ηinv (T' b) = ?t2
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
φ f0 · ?t2 = φ f0 · ηinv (T b) · f b
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad J
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: D ⟦ F (J a), F (T b) ⟧
φ f0
· (ηinv (T b)
   · # (functor_identity C) (RelMonadMor_map f b)) =
φ f0 · ηinv (T b) · f b

    apply assoc.
Qed.

Definition RelMonadMor_composed : RelMonadMor (RelMonad_composed T) (RelMonad_composed T')
  := RelMonadMor_composed_data ,, RelMonadMor_composed_axioms.

End RelMonad_transfer_morphism.

(** ** Postcomposing a monad with the right adjoint of a coreflection *)

Section RelMonad_transfer_radj_object.

Variable (T : RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)).


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
RelMonad_data J

φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

RelMonad_data J

R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
A → C
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

∏ c : A, C ⟦ J c, ?pr1 c ⟧
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G

invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
(λ _ : ∏ c : A, C ⟦ J c, ?pr1 c ⟧,
 ∏ c d : A, C ⟦ J c, ?pr1 d ⟧ → C ⟦ ?pr1 c, ?pr1 d ⟧)
  ?pr10

  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
A → C
 exact (λ a, G (T a)).
  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G

inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧

  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

∏ c : A, C ⟦ J c, (λ a : A, G (T a)) c ⟧
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧

  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

∏ c : A, C ⟦ J c, G (T c) ⟧
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧

  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
a: A
C ⟦ J a, G (T a) ⟧
 exact (φ (r_eta T _ )).
  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
(λ _ : ∏ c : A, C ⟦ J c, (λ a : A, G (T a)) c ⟧,
 ∏ c d : A,
 C ⟦ J c, (λ a : A, G (T a)) d ⟧
 → C ⟦ (λ a : A, G (T a)) c, (λ a : A, G (T a)) d ⟧)
  ((λ a : A, φ (r_eta T a))
   :
   ∏ c : A, C ⟦ J c, (λ a : A, G (T a)) c ⟧)
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
∏ c d : A, C ⟦ J c, G (T d) ⟧ → C ⟦ G (T c), G (T d) ⟧
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
a, b: A
f: C ⟦ J a, G (T b) ⟧
C ⟦ G (T a), G (T b) ⟧

    exact (#G (r_bind T (φ_adj_inv R f))).
Defined.

Notation "'σ'" := (r_bind T).
Notation "'v'" := (r_eta T).
Notation "'φ'" := (φ_adj R).
Notation "'φ-1'" := (φ_adj_inv R).

Variable (TH : RelMonad_axioms T).


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
RelMonad_axioms RelMonad_composed_radj_data


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
RelMonad_axioms RelMonad_composed_radj_data

R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)

inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)

  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

TH: RelMonad_axioms T

# G (σ (φ-1 (φ (v c)))) = identity (G (T c))
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
φ (v c) · # G (σ (φ-1 f)) = f
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
g: C ⟦ J d, RelMonad_composed_radj_data e ⟧
# G (σ (φ-1 f)) · # G (σ (φ-1 g)) =
# G (σ (φ-1 (f · # G (σ (φ-1 g)))))

eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧

corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)

ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

TH: RelMonad_axioms T

    apply functor_id.
  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
φ (v c) · # G (σ (φ-1 f)) = f
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
φ (v c) · # G (σ (φ-1 f)) = ?b

φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d: A

A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
g: C ⟦ J d, RelMonad_composed_radj_data e ⟧
# G (σ (φ-1 f)) · # G (σ (φ-1 g)) =
# G (σ (φ-1 (f · # G (σ (φ-1 g)))))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
g: C ⟦ J d, RelMonad_composed_radj_data e ⟧
# G (σ (φ-1 f)) · # G (σ (φ-1 g)) = ?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
g: C ⟦ J d, RelMonad_composed_radj_data e ⟧
?b = # G (σ (φ-1 (f · # G (σ (φ-1 g)))))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
g: C ⟦ J d, RelMonad_composed_radj_data e ⟧
# G (σ (φ-1 f) · σ (φ-1 g)) =
# G (σ (φ-1 (f · # G (σ (φ-1 g)))))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
g: C ⟦ J d, RelMonad_composed_radj_data e ⟧
σ (φ-1 f) · σ (φ-1 g) = σ (φ-1 (f · # G (σ (φ-1 g))))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G

φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

TH: RelMonad_axioms T

g: C ⟦ J d, RelMonad_composed_radj_data e ⟧
σ (φ-1 f) · σ (φ-1 g) = ?b

invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
g: C ⟦ J d, RelMonad_composed_radj_data e ⟧
?b = σ (φ-1 (f · # G (σ (φ-1 g))))
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
g: C ⟦ J d, RelMonad_composed_radj_data e ⟧
σ (φ-1 f · σ (φ-1 g)) = σ (φ-1 (f · # G (σ (φ-1 g))))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
g: C ⟦ J d, RelMonad_composed_radj_data e ⟧
φ-1 f · σ (φ-1 g) = φ-1 (f · # G (σ (φ-1 g)))

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T: RelMonad_data (J ∙ F)
TH: RelMonad_axioms T
c, d, e: A
f: C ⟦ J c, RelMonad_composed_radj_data d ⟧
g: C ⟦ J d, RelMonad_composed_radj_data e ⟧
φ-1 (f · # G (σ (φ-1 g))) = φ-1 f · σ (φ-1 g)
 apply (φ_adj_inv_natural_postcomp R).
Defined.

End RelMonad_transfer_radj_object.

Definition RelMonad_composed_radj (T : RelMonad (J ∙ F)) : RelMonad J
    := RelMonad_composed_radj_data T,, RelMonad_composed_radj_axioms _ T.

(** ** Postcomposing a monad morphism with the right adjoint of a coreflection *)

Section RelMonad_transfer_radj_morphism.

Context {T T' : RelMonad (J ∙ F)}
        (f : RelMonadMor T T').

Notation "'σ'" := (r_bind _).
Notation "'v'" := (r_eta _).
Notation "'φ'" := (φ_adj R).
Notation "'φ-1'" := (φ_adj_inv R).


Definition RelMonadMor_composed_radj_data
  : RelMonadMor_data (RelMonad_composed_radj T) (RelMonad_composed_radj T')
  := λ a, (#G (RelMonadMor_map f a)).


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
RelMonadMor_axioms RelMonadMor_composed_radj_data


A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
RelMonadMor_axioms RelMonadMor_composed_radj_data

  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
φ (v a) · RelMonadMor_composed_radj_data a = φ (v a)
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: C ⟦ J a, G (T b) ⟧
RelMonadMor_composed_radj_data a
· # G
    (σ (φ-1 (f0 · RelMonadMor_composed_radj_data b))) =
# G (σ (φ-1 f0)) · RelMonadMor_composed_radj_data b

  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)

ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
φ (v a) · RelMonadMor_composed_radj_data a = φ (v a)
 
A, C, D: category

eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
φ (v a) · # G (RelMonadMor_map f a) = φ (v a)
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
φ (v a) · # G (RelMonadMor_map f a) = φ (v a)

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧

inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
φ (v a) · # G (RelMonadMor_map f a) = ?b
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧),
invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
?b = φ (v a)
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
φ (v a · RelMonadMor_map f a) = φ (v a)

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
