ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a: A
v a · RelMonadMor_map f a = v a
 apply (r_eta_α f).
  
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: C ⟦ J a, G (T b) ⟧
RelMonadMor_composed_radj_data a
· # G
    (σ (φ-1 (f0 · RelMonadMor_composed_radj_data b))) =
# G (σ (φ-1 f0)) · RelMonadMor_composed_radj_data b
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: C ⟦ J a, G (T b) ⟧
# G (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # G (σ (φ-1 (f0 · # G (RelMonadMor_map f b)))) =
# G (σ (φ-1 f0)) · # G (RelMonadMor_map f b)
 
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)
T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: C ⟦ J a, G (T b) ⟧
# G (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # G (σ (φ-1 (f0 · # G (RelMonadMor_map f b)))) =
# G (σ (φ-1 f0)) · # G (RelMonadMor_map f b)

    
A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G
NHW:= nathomweq_from_adj R: natural_hom_weq F G
φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧
corefl: ∏ c : C, is_iso (eta c)
ηinv:= λ X : C,
inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: C ⟦ J a, G (T b) ⟧
# G (RelMonadMor_map f a)
· # G (σ (φ-1 (f0 · # G (RelMonadMor_map f b)))) = 
?b

invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

inv_from_iso (make_iso (eta X) (corefl X)): ∏ X : C, C ⟦ G (F X), X ⟧
ηinv_is_natural: is_nat_trans (F ∙ G)
  (functor_identity C)
  (λ X : C, ηinv X)

?b = # G (σ (φ-1 f0)) · # G (RelMonadMor_map f b)

A, C, D: category
J: A ⟶ C
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
eta: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
H: form_adjunction F G eta eps
R:= (eta,, eps),, H: are_adjoints F G

φ:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (f : D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧), hom_weq NHW f: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧
φinv:= λ (X : C) (Y : D) (g : C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧), invweq (hom_weq NHW) g: ∏ (X : C) (Y : D), C ⟦ X, G Y ⟧ → D ⟦ F X, Y ⟧

  (functor_identity C)

T, T': RelMonad (J ∙ F)
f: RelMonadMor T T'
a, b: A
f0: C ⟦ J a, G (T b) ⟧
RelMonadMor_map f a · σ (φ-1 f0 · RelMonadMor_map f b) =
σ (φ-1 f0) · RelMonadMor_map f b

    apply (α_r_bind f).
Qed.

Definition RelMonadMor_composed_radj : RelMonadMor (RelMonad_composed_radj T) (RelMonad_composed_radj T')
  := RelMonadMor_composed_radj_data ,, RelMonadMor_composed_radj_axioms.

End RelMonad_transfer_radj_morphism.

End RMonad_transfer.
